sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n105780" key="trwglodu/nwn" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">τρωγλο-δύνων</orth> <pron extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="pron">[ῠ]</pron>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">οντος</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>, <sense id="n105780.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">creeping into a hole,</tr_> of a mouse, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg1220.tlg001:52" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Batr.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">52</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
